content.fact_text: Production-ready ProductRepository implementing full CRUD operations, soft-delete functionality, and atomic inventory management using SQL transactions and row-level locking.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides high-concurrency, ACID-compliant CRUD operations and atomic inventory adjustments for the product catalog. Uses row-level locking for inventory integrity.
provenance_data.utility: Handles all persistence logic for the product catalog including CRUD and atomic inventory transactions within the ACID-compliant backend architecture.
